outcome_summary: Fourth routine fire of the T-SEED-QA seed-graph QA census. Scored shard 04 — 27 pedagogical_prerequisite edges (C1) + 20 nodes (C2/C3) per the pinned seed_qa_audit.md rubric — and wrote seed_qa_evidence/shard_04.md. Findings: C1 0/27 defective = 0.0% (the first 0-defect shard of the census; 26 Sound, 1 Defensible — E-21 speech_act->gricean_maxims, two somewhat-parallel pragmatic theories rather than a tight dependency); C2 0/20 fail; C3 0/20 fail (uniformly high node quality across 20 INTERPRETED/active nodes). Zero audit-touched edges — all 27 carry evidence=NULL and none of the (source,target) pairs match the S-0122 follow-up migrations 0061-0065. Three Sound verdicts carry a noted both-ways alternative (E-2 existence->property, E-7 philosophy_of_science->scientific_method, E-20 material_conditional->indicative_conditional) — all resolve Sound by the seed's field->topic / curricular-order conventions; flagged for the closeout's consistency review. Running C1 across shards 01-04: 10.7% / 3.6% / 3.6% / 0.0%, converging well below the production audit's 13% baseline. Candidate findings only — disposition is the SQA-20 closeout. SQA-04 marked complete; SQA-05 next. No in-band Issues. mempalace_zero_citations_after_search fires because the boot search returned 0 drawers above the 0.6 threshold (substrate up; nothing relevant to cite) — same benign shape as S-0161. 0 validator hard-fails (50 checks on --final-check).
